Estamos migrando código referente ao "Rewards Program" de /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place para cá; aqui é um novo
  repositorio dedicado exclusivamente ao programa de pontos, que substitui o atual sistema de Cashback. O ultimo commit neste repositorio
  contem a ultima parte que faltava, a migração da feature "Detalhes do pedido", porém a migração foi feita pelo claude code que alucinou
  algumas vezes. Veja o repositorio do cardplace, as diffs criadas  pela branch `feature/SPMAIS-32275_`, a atual - essa branch contem as
  alterações, remoções, adições, etc (diffs)  referentes a feature "Detalhes do pedido", ela tem muitos merges então dificultou pra eu
  conseguir entender o que é da feature especifica e o que é resolução de conflitos. Sua task: analise profundamente e encontre todas as
  diferenças do codigo original e do código migrado - Absolutamente nada de
  logica deve ser alterada, correções de tipagem, paths e outras sem grande
  impacto produtivo são permitidas, mas com extremo cuidado pois o app já foi
  exaustivamente testado
  com o código no card-place e os testes automatizados não são confiaveis (app nativo, muitas apis, etc). Crie um relatorio md com todas as
  alucinações e erros do claude code durante a migração salva no ultimo commit. NÃO USE SUBAGENTS PARA FAZER AS COMPARACOES. As outras features
   já foram migradas, e verificadas, falta apenas a "Detalhes do pedido", que foi migrada no ultimo commit (squash)
  74de00f292e2cad44c310fc17b2a7c7810bdef4b - Lembre-se de verificar também se não há arquivos ou alterações não migradas/faltantes.

  Então inicie as possiveis correções necessárias:

  1 - Leia atentamente cada um dos outros reports salvos em ./.claude (leia e
  entenda, não escaneie, entenda, analise)
  2 - No modo planejamento,  crie um plano para
    corrigir todas as alucinações e erros.
  3 - saia do modo planejamento e implemente o plano.
  4 - Execute `npm run lint` e corrija todos os erros
    apontados pelo resultado do script.
  5 - commit o resultado
  6 - lance 10 subagents independentes para revisar o trabalho feito, explique
       detalhadamente para os subagents o que foi feito, eles devem fazer
       analise como num pull request - verifique as criticas, implemente o que
       for necessário, comite e encerre.

    36→### 2. `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:118-119`
    37→
    38→**Descrição:** Alteração no layout do componente de lista vazia

    52→
    53→---
    54→
    55→### 3. `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx:125-134 → 138-156`
    56→
    57→**Descrição:** Adição de memoização no `enrichedTransaction`
    58→
    59→| Aspecto | Original (Card-Place) | Migrado (Reward-Program) |
    60→|---------|----------------------|--------------------------|
    61→| Código | Cálculo inline direto | Encapsulado em `useMemo` |
    62→| Comportamento | Recalcula em toda renderização | Memoizado com dependências |
    63→
    64→**Original:**
    65→```typescript
    66→const enrichedTransaction = transaction ? {
    67→  ...transaction,
    68→  type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
    69→  icon: passedIcon || transaction.icon,
    70→  status: passedStatus || transaction.status,
    71→  details: {
    72→    ...transaction.details,
    73→    provider: passedOrigination || transaction.details?.provider || '',
    74→  },
    75→} : undefined;
    76→```
    77→
    78→**Migrado:**
    79→```typescript
    80→const enrichedTransaction = useMemo(() => {
    81→  if (!transaction) return undefined;
    82→  return {
    83→    ...transaction,
    84→    type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
    85→    icon: passedIcon || transaction.icon,
    86→    status: passedStatus || transaction.status,
    87→    details: {
    88→      ...transaction.details,
    89→      provider: passedOrigination || transaction.details?.provider || '',
    90→    },
    91→  };
    92→}, [
    93→  transaction,
    94→  passedType,
    95→  passedIcon,
    96→  passedStatus,
    97→  passedOrigination,
    98→]);
    99→```
   100→
   101→**Impacto:** A memoização altera o ciclo de vida do objeto. O original cria um novo objeto a cada render, enquanto o migrado mantém a mesma referência se as dependências não mudarem. Isso pode afetar comparações de referência e re-renders de componentes filhos.

   104→

   109→**Descrição:** Alteração nos tipos de `valuePoints`

   115→| `MarketplaceContentData.valuePoints` | `number` | `number \| string` |

   141→
   142→**Impacto:** Os tipos foram expandidos para aceitar strings, o que pode mascarar erros de tipo em tempo de compilação e permitir dados inconsistentes.

   188→**Impacto:** Baixo. A interface não era utilizada no código.

# Relatório de Alucinações/Erros na Migração - Feature "Detalhes do Pedido"

**Commit Analisado:** `74de00f292e2cad44c310fc17b2a7c7810bdef4b`
**Data da Análise:** 2026-02-10
**Branch Original (card-place):** `feature/SPMAIS-32275_`

---

## Resumo Executivo

A migração da feature "Detalhes do Pedido" do repositório `rnm-app-fintech-card-place` para `rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram` apresentou **várias alterações de lógica e comportamento** que diferem do código original testado. Este relatório documenta todas as diferenças encontradas.

---

## ERROS CRÍTICOS (Alteração de Lógica)

### 1. `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:97`

**Descrição:** Alteração na exibição do valor de pontos

| Aspecto | Original (Card-Place) | Migrado (Reward-Program) |
|---------|----------------------|--------------------------|
| Código | `titleDescription={String(item.amount)}` | `titleDescription={String(Math.abs(item.amount))}` |
| Comportamento | Mostra o valor como está (pode ser negativo) | Sempre mostra valor absoluto (positivo) |

**Impacto:** Em transações de resgate/uso de pontos, o valor original pode ser negativo (ex: `-500`). O código migrado mostrará `500` ao invés de `-500`, alterando a informação exibida ao usuário.

**Arquivo:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`
```diff
- titleDescription={String(item.amount)}
+ titleDescription={String(Math.abs(item.amount))}
```

---

### 2. `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:118-119`

**Descrição:** Alteração no layout do componente de lista vazia

| Aspecto | Original (Card-Place) | Migrado (Reward-Program) |
|---------|----------------------|--------------------------|
| Código | `<Box height="100%" align="center" justify="center" mt="larger">` | `<Box align="center" pd="innerLarger" justify="center" mt="larger">` |
| Comportamento | Usa altura 100% | Remove altura e adiciona padding |

**Impacto:** O layout visual do estado vazio será diferente, podendo afetar a centralização do conteúdo.

**Arquivo:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`
```diff
- <Box height="100%" align="center" justify="center" mt="larger">
+ <Box align="center" pd="innerLarger" justify="center" mt="larger">
```

---

### 3. `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx:125-134 → 138-156`

**Descrição:** Adição de memoização no `enrichedTransaction`

| Aspecto | Original (Card-Place) | Migrado (Reward-Program) |
|---------|----------------------|--------------------------|
| Código | Cálculo inline direto | Encapsulado em `useMemo` |
| Comportamento | Recalcula em toda renderização | Memoizado com dependências |

**Original:**
```typescript
const enrichedTransaction = transaction ? {
  ...transaction,
  type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
  icon: passedIcon || transaction.icon,
  status: passedStatus || transaction.status,
  details: {
    ...transaction.details,
    provider: passedOrigination || transaction.details?.provider || '',
  },
} : undefined;
```

**Migrado:**
```typescript
const enrichedTransaction = useMemo(() => {
  if (!transaction) return undefined;
  return {
    ...transaction,
    type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
    icon: passedIcon || transaction.icon,
    status: passedStatus || transaction.status,
    details: {
      ...transaction.details,
      provider: passedOrigination || transaction.details?.provider || '',
    },
  };
}, [
  transaction,
  passedType,
  passedIcon,
  passedStatus,
  passedOrigination,
]);
```

**Impacto:** A memoização altera o ciclo de vida do objeto. O original cria um novo objeto a cada render, enquanto o migrado mantém a mesma referência se as dependências não mudarem. Isso pode afetar comparações de referência e re-renders de componentes filhos.

# Migration Analysis Report: Order Details Feature

## Commit Analyzed: `74de00f292e2cad44c310fc17b2a7c7810bdef4b`

**Date:** 2026-02-10
**Source Repository:** `rnm-app-fintech-card-place` (branch: `feature/SPMAIS-32275_`)
**Target Repository:** `rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram`

---

## Summary

This report documents all discrepancies found between the original code in `card-place` and the migrated code in `rewardprogram`. The analysis focuses on logic changes, missing code, and potential hallucinations by Claude Code during migration.

---

## Critical Issues (Logic Changes)

### 1. **MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx - Amount Display Changed**
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`
**Line:** ~97

| Original (card-place) | Migrated (rewardprogram) |
|----------------------|--------------------------|
| `titleDescription={String(item.amount)}` | `titleDescription={String(Math.abs(item.amount))}` |

**Impact:** The original displays the raw amount (can be negative), while the migrated version always shows the absolute value. This changes the user-visible data.

**Action Required:** Revert to `String(item.amount)` to match original behavior.

---

### 2. **services/constants.ts - Missing Analytics Events**
**File:** `src/services/constants.ts`

The following analytics events exist in `card-place` but are **missing** in the migrated version:

```typescript
// Missing in migrated version:
PRODUCTS_SUCCESS: {
  content_type: 'sucesso',
  content_id: 'rewardprogram/v1/product-list',
  location_1: 'monetizacao',
  location_2: 'spmais',
  location_3: 'home',
},
PRODUCTS_ERROR: {
  content_type: 'erro',
  content_id: 'rewardprogram/v1/product-list',
  location_1: 'monetizacao',
  location_2: 'spmais',
  location_3: 'home',
},
ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS: {
  content_type: 'sucesso',
  content_id: 'rewardprogram/v1/extract-details',
  location_1: 'monetizacao',
  location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
  location_3: 'detalhes_transacao',
},
ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR: {
  content_type: 'erro',
  content_id: 'rewardprogram/v1/extract-details',
  location_1: 'monetizacao',
  location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
  location_3: 'detalhes_transacao',
},
```

**Impact:** Analytics events for order detail and products won't be tracked properly.

**Action Required:** Add the missing analytics constants.

---

### 3. **orderDetail.service.ts - Analytics Events Using Invalid Type Casts**
**File:** `src/services/services/orderDetail.service.ts`
**Lines:** 24, 33

```typescript
// Migrated version uses type casts to suppress errors:
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS' as never);
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR' as never);
```

**Impact:** The `as never` casts indicate the constants don't exist. These analytics calls will either fail or be ignored at runtime.

**Action Required:** Add the missing `ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS` and `ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR` to constants.ts.

---

### 4. **MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx - Theme Import Source Changed**
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`
**Line:** 10

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `import theme from '../../styles/theme';` | `import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';` |

And usage in RefreshControl:

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `tintColor={"BRAND_BASE_01"}` | `tintColor={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01}` |

**Impact:** Different theme sources could yield different color values. The original passes a string literal, migrated passes a resolved color.

**Action Required:** Verify both approaches yield the same visual result or revert to original approach.

---

### 5. **MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx - Theme Import Source Changed**
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx`
**Line:** 13

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `import theme from '../../styles/theme';` | `import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';` |

**Impact:** Same issue as above - different theme source.

**Action Required:** Ensure consistency with the rest of the codebase.

---

## Medium Issues (Structural Changes)

### 6. **MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx - Component Signature Changed**
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx`
**Line:** 30

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `const MyOrdersDetails: FC<ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>> = ({ navigation, route }) => {` | `const MyOrdersDetails = ({ route }: ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>) => {` |
| Uses destructured `navigation` | Uses `const navigation = useNavigation();` |

**Impact:** Functionally equivalent, but changes the component's type annotation style. Should work but is inconsistent with original.

---

### 7. **MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx - Added useMemo Around enrichedTransaction**
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx`
**Lines:** 138-156

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| Direct object construction without memo | Wrapped in `useMemo` with dependencies |

**Original:**
```typescript
const enrichedTransaction = transaction ? {
  ...transaction,
  type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
  // ...
} : undefined;
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
const enrichedTransaction = useMemo(() => {
  if (!transaction) return undefined;
  return {
    ...transaction,
    type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
    // ...
  };
}, [transaction, passedType, passedIcon, passedStatus, passedOrigination]);
```

**Impact:** Changes re-rendering behavior. Could affect performance or cause stale data in edge cases.

**Action Required:** Consider reverting to match original behavior.

---

### 8. **MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts - Missing Interface**
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts`

The `MyOrdersItem` interface was completely removed in the migration:

```typescript
// Missing in migrated version:
export interface MyOrdersItem {
    id: string
    date: string
    description: string
    type: string
    amount: string
    icon: string
    status: string
    origination: string
}
```

**Impact:** If this interface is used elsewhere, it will cause TypeScript errors. If unused, removal is acceptable.

**Action Required:** Verify the interface is not imported/used elsewhere.

---

### 9. **MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx - ListEmptyComponent Layout Changed**
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`
**Line:** 119

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `<Box height="100%" align="center" justify="center" mt="larger">` | `<Box align="center" pd="innerLarger" justify="center" mt="larger">` |

**Impact:** Layout change - original uses `height="100%"`, migrated uses `pd="innerLarger"` instead. Different visual appearance.

**Action Required:** Revert to original Box props.

---

## Minor Issues (Type/Style Changes)

### 10. **MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts - Type Widening**
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts`

| Interface | Original Type | Migrated Type |
|-----------|--------------|---------------|
| `MarketplaceItemData.valuePoints` | `number` | `number \| string` |
| `MarketplaceContentData.shippingValuePoints` | `number` | `number \| string` |
| `MarketplaceContentData.valuePoints` | `number` | `number \| string` |

**Impact:** Type widening could mask bugs where strings are accidentally passed.

---

### 11. **MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts - Type Widening**
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts`
**Line:** 24

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `options.value: number` | `options.value: number \| string` |

**Impact:** Same as above - type widening could mask bugs.

---

### 12. **MyOrdersDetails/utils.ts - Parameter Rename**
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/utils.ts`
**Line:** 53

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `gainType: TransactionGainType` | `_gainType: TransactionGainType` |

**Impact:** The underscore prefix indicates unused parameter. This is a style change, not a bug.

---

### 13. **Type Casts Changed (Multiple Files)**
Multiple files changed `as any` to `as never`:

- `view.tsx:101` - `(marketplaceContent.statusColor as any)` to `(marketplaceContent.statusColor as never)`
- `view.tsx:159` - `iconRight={null as any}` to `iconRight={null as never}`
- `view.tsx:191` - `icon={transaction.icon as any}` to `icon={transaction.icon as never}`

**Impact:** TypeScript style change only, no runtime impact.

---

## ExtractRewardProgram Changes (Already Migrated - Verify Only)

### 14. **ExtractRewardProgram/index.ts - hasError Logic Changed**
**File:** `src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/index.ts`
**Lines:** 79-83

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `hasError: false` (hardcoded) | Actual error checking logic |

**Migrated version:**
```typescript
const hasError =
  pointsExtract.status === PointsExtractStatus.ERROR &&
  !isLoadingExtract &&
  (!pointsExtract.extractData ||
    !pointsExtract.extractData.transactions?.length);
```

**Impact:** This is an **improvement** over original, but was not in the Order Details feature scope.

**Note:** This file was listed as modified in the commit but these changes appear to be enhancements beyond the Order Details feature scope. Verify if intentional.

---

### 15. **ExtractRewardProgram/index.ts - Added refreshExtractData and useFocusEffect**
**File:** `src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/index.ts`
**Lines:** 107-119

New function and hook added that didn't exist in original:

```typescript
const refreshExtractData = useCallback(() => {
  pointsExtractActions.setExtractStatus(PointsExtractStatus.IDLE);
  pointsExtractActions.setBalanceStatus(PointsBalanceStatus.IDLE);
  pointsExtractActions.setLoadingMore(false);
  getPointsBalance();
  getPointsExtract({ page: EXTRACT_CONSTANTS.DEFAULT_PAGE });
}, [pointsExtractActions]);

useFocusEffect(
  useCallback(() => {
    refreshExtractData();
  }, [refreshExtractData]),
);
```

**Impact:** Additional data refresh on screen focus. This changes behavior beyond Order Details feature.

**Note:** Verify if this change was intentional for this migration.

---

## Summary of Required Actions

### Must Fix (Critical):
1. Revert `Math.abs()` in `MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx` line 97
2. Add missing analytics constants (`ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS`, `ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR`, `PRODUCTS_SUCCESS`, `PRODUCTS_ERROR`)
3. Verify theme import consistency across files

### Should Review:
4. Remove `useMemo` wrapper around `enrichedTransaction` or justify its addition
5. Revert `ListEmptyComponent` Box props to original
6. Review type widenings (`number | string`) and verify they're intentional

### Optional/Style:
7. Review type cast changes (`any` to `never`)
8. Verify `MyOrdersItem` interface removal doesn't break other code

---

## Files Requiring Changes

| File | Priority | Issue Count |
|------|----------|-------------|
| `src/services/constants.ts` | Critical | 1 |
| `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx` | Critical | 2 |

| `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx` | Medium | 2 |

# Migration Analysis Report: Order Details Feature
## Commit: 74de00f292e2cad44c310fc17b2a7c7810bdef4b

**Source Repository:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place` (branch: `feature/SPMAIS-32275_`)
**Target Repository:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram`
**Analysis Date:** 2026-02-10

---

## Executive Summary

The migration of the "Order Details" (MyOrdersDetails) feature contained **14 significant differences** from the original code. Several of these are **logic-altering changes** that could affect app behavior.

### Severity Classification:
- **CRITICAL (Logic Changes):** 3 issues
- **HIGH (Type/Interface Changes):** 5 issues
- **MEDIUM (Styling/Layout):** 3 issues
- **LOW (Cosmetic/Formatting):** 3 issues

---

## CRITICAL Issues (Logic Changes)

### 1. Math.abs() Added to Amount Display
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx` (Line 97)

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `titleDescription={String(item.amount)}` | `titleDescription={String(Math.abs(item.amount))}` |

**Impact:** This changes how negative values are displayed. If `amount` is `-500`, the original shows `-500`, but the migrated code shows `500`. This is a **logic change that alters user-facing data**.

---

### 2. Hallucinated Property: `origination` Added to PointsTransaction
**File:** `src/services/models/extract.model.ts` (Line 75)

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| No `origination` property | `origination?: string;` |

**Impact:** Claude Code added a property that **does not exist in the original interface**. While this might not break functionality immediately, it's an undocumented addition that wasn't part of the original feature.

---

### 3. Type Assertion Changed: `as never` Instead of Direct Call
**File:** `src/services/services/orderDetail.service.ts` (Lines 24, 33)

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS');` | `eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS' as never);` |
| `eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR');` | `eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR' as never);` |

**Impact:** Using `as never` is a TypeScript hack that bypasses type checking. This could mask actual type errors and might indicate the function signature doesn't match the expected types in this repository.

---

## HIGH Priority Issues (Type/Interface Changes)

### 4. Interface Removed: `MyOrdersItem`
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| Contains `MyOrdersItem` interface | Interface removed |

```typescript
// ORIGINAL - This interface was removed:
export interface MyOrdersItem {
    id: string
    date: string
    description: string
    type: string
    amount: string
    icon: string
    status: string
    origination: string
}
```

**Impact:** If any code references this interface, it will fail. The interface might be unused, but this should be verified.

---

### 5. Type Widened: valuePoints from `number` to `number | string`
**Files:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `valuePoints: number;` | `valuePoints: number \| string;` |
| `shippingValuePoints?: number;` | `shippingValuePoints?: number \| string;` |

**Impact:** This widens the type, which is generally safe but indicates potential inconsistency in how the data is handled. The original expects numbers only.

---

### 6. Parameter Name Changed in Type Definition
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `handleDetailsOrders: (orderId: string, ...)` | `handleDetailsOrders: (transactionId: string, ...)` |

**Impact:** While semantically similar, this could cause confusion when reading code or debugging.

---

### 7. Filter Options Type Changed
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `value: number` | `value: number \| string` |

**Impact:** The filter options type was widened to accept strings, which might not be necessary based on original implementation.

---

### 8. Extra Type Export Added
**File:** `src/services/models/orderDetail.model.ts`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `import { PointsTransaction } from './extract.model';` | Added: `export type { PointsTransaction };` |

**Impact:** Low impact, but this is an addition not in the original.

---

## MEDIUM Priority Issues (Styling/Layout)

### 9. RefreshControl tintColor Access Changed
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx` (Line 48)

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `tintColor={"BRAND_BASE_01"}` | `tintColor={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01}` |

**Impact:** Different approach to accessing the color. The original passes a string token, the migrated version passes the actual color value. This **might work differently** depending on how RefreshControl processes the color prop.

---

### 10. ListEmptyComponent Layout Changed

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `<Box height="100%" align="center" justify="center" mt="larger">` | `<Box align="center" pd="innerLarger" justify="center" mt="larger">` |

**Impact:** The layout styling was changed. Original uses `height="100%"`, migrated uses `pd="innerLarger"` instead. This could result in **different visual appearance**.

---

### 11. ts-ignore Comment Added
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx` (Line 122-123)

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| No comment | `/* @ts-ignore \`source\` is not in the props Of \`image\` ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°) */` |

**Impact:** A ts-ignore was added to suppress a type error. This might hide actual type issues.

---

## LOW Priority Issues (Cosmetic/Formatting)

### 12. Type Assertion Style Changed
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `as any` | `as never` |

**Impact:** Minor difference in type assertion style.

---

### 13. useMemo Added to enrichedTransaction
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx` (Lines 138-156)

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| Direct object creation | Wrapped in `useMemo` |

**Impact:** This is actually a **performance improvement**. The original creates the object on every render, the migrated version memoizes it. However, this changes reference identity behavior which could affect components using shallow comparison.

---

### 14. Height Calculation Format
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `modalHeight={height * 0.30}` | `modalHeight={height * 0.3}` |

**Impact:** Functionally equivalent (0.30 === 0.3).

| `src/store/rewardProgram/models/orderDetail.model.ts` | `src/services/models/orderDetail.model.ts` | Migrated with changes |
| `src/store/rewardProgram/repository/orderDetail.repository.ts` | `src/services/repository/orderDetail.repository.ts` | Migrated correctly |
| `src/store/rewardProgram/services/orderDetail.service.ts` | `src/services/services/orderDetail.service.ts` | Migrated with changes |
| `src/store/rewardProgram/store/orderDetail.store.ts` | `src/services/store/orderDetail.store.ts` | Migrated correctly |

---

## Additional Files Modified (Supporting Changes)

These files were correctly modified to integrate the Order Details feature:

- `src/routes/Models/index.ts` - Route types added
- `src/routes/index.tsx` - Route registered
- `src/services/api/index.ts` - Export added
- `src/services/models/index.ts` - Export added
- `src/services/models/extract.model.ts` - Marketplace interfaces + `origination` added
- `src/services/repository/index.ts` - Export added
- `src/services/services/index.ts` - Export added
- `src/services/store/index.ts` - Export added
- `src/services/store/slices.ts` - OrderDetailSlice integrated
- `src/services/constants.ts` - Analytics events added
- `src/services/utils/cleanup.ts` - Cleanup action added
- `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/index.tsx` - Navigation to details
- `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx` - UI changes (with issues noted above)
- `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts` - Interface changes
- `src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/index.ts` - Added "Estornados" filter option

---

## Recommendations

### Must Fix (CRITICAL):

1. **Remove Math.abs()** from `MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:97`
   - Revert to: `titleDescription={String(item.amount)}`

2. **Verify `origination` property necessity** in `extract.model.ts`
   - Either remove it if not needed, or document why it was added

3. **Fix `eventServerResponse` type issues** instead of using `as never`
   - Investigate why the types don't match and fix properly

### Should Fix (HIGH):

---

## Conclusion

The migration has logic-altering differences that should be corrected before release. The most critical issue is the `Math.abs()` addition which changes how amounts are displayed to users. The hallucinated `origination` property and type assertion hacks should also be addressed.

# Migration Analysis: Order Details Feature

**Source:** `rnm-app-fintech-card-place` (branch `feature/SPMAIS-32275_`)
**Target:** `rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram` (commit `74de00f2`)
**Date:** 2026-02-10

---

## Summary

| Severity | Count | Description |
|----------|-------|-------------|
| Critical | 3 | Behavioral changes that may cause functional differences |
| Behavioral | 3 | Changes that alter visible behavior or data |
| Type Safety | 2 | TypeScript changes that reduce type safety |
| Minor | 4 | Cosmetic or style changes |
| **Total** | **12** | Issues requiring review |

---

## Critical Issues (Behavioral Changes)

### 1. `enrichedTransaction` wrapped in `useMemo` - LOGIC CHANGE

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx`

**Original (cardplace):**
```typescript
const enrichedTransaction = transaction ? {
  ...transaction,
  type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
  // ...
} : undefined;
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
const enrichedTransaction = useMemo(() => {
  if (!transaction) return undefined;
  return {
    ...transaction,
    // ...
  };
}, [transaction, passedType, passedIcon, passedStatus, passedOrigination]);
```

**Impact:** The original recalculates on every render. The migrated version only recalculates when dependencies change. This could cause stale data in edge cases where the object reference changes but the values don't.

**Recommendation:** Verify that all relevant dependencies are included. If `transaction` is a new object on each render with same values, this optimization is correct. If referential equality matters downstream, this could cause issues.

---

### 2. Component signature changed - STRUCTURAL CHANGE

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx`

**Original:**
```typescript
const MyOrdersDetails: FC<ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>> = ({
  navigation,
  route,
}) => {
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
const MyOrdersDetails = ({ route }: ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>) => {
  const navigation = useNavigation();
```

**Impact:** Changed from receiving `navigation` from props to using `useNavigation()` hook. This is a structural change that alters how navigation is obtained.

**Recommendation:** Both approaches are valid in React Navigation, but ensure consistency across the codebase. The hook approach is more modern and recommended.

---

### 3. Missing `handleOpenInfo` prop in view destructuring

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx`

**Original:**
```typescript
const MyOrdersDetailView: FC<MyOrdersDetailProps> = ({
  // ...
  handleOpenInfo,
  handleCloseInfo,
  // ...
}) => {
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
const MyOrdersDetailView: FC<MyOrdersDetailProps> = ({
  // ...
  handleCloseInfo,  // handleOpenInfo is MISSING!
  // ...
}) => {
```

**Impact:** The `handleOpenInfo` prop is defined in the interface but not destructured. The function exists but is never used in the view (neither in original nor migrated), but the prop was incorrectly removed from destructuring.

**Recommendation:** Either remove `handleOpenInfo` from the interface entirely, or restore it in the destructuring for consistency. If unused, prefer removing from both.

---

## Behavioral Issues

### 4. `tintColor` changed from string to theme reference

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`

**Original:**
```typescript
tintColor={"BRAND_BASE_01"}
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
tintColor={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01}
```

**Impact:** The original passed a string token; the migrated passes the actual color value. RefreshControl might handle these differently. If the design system expects the token string, this would break styling.

**Recommendation:** Verify which format `RefreshControl.tintColor` expects. React Native's RefreshControl expects an actual color value, so the migrated version is likely correct.

---

### 5. `Math.abs()` added to amount display

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`

**Original:**
```typescript
titleDescription={String(item.amount)}
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
titleDescription={String(Math.abs(item.amount))}
```

**Impact:** Negative amounts will now display as positive. This changes the visible data to users.

**Recommendation:** **Clarify business requirement.** If negative amounts should display with their sign (e.g., "-50 points"), revert this change. If absolute values are intended (common for "spent" amounts), keep it.

---

### 6. `as never` type assertions added to `eventServerResponse`

**File:** `src/services/services/orderDetail.service.ts`

**Original:**
```typescript
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS');
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR');
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS' as never);
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR' as never);
```

**Impact:** Type safety hack that bypasses TypeScript. While it compiles, it indicates the event types might not be properly defined in the events system.

**Recommendation:** Add `ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS` and `ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR` to the event type definitions instead of using `as never`.

---

## Type Safety Issues

### 7. Type widening in `MarketplaceItemData` and `MarketplaceContentData`

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts`

**Original:**
```typescript
export interface MarketplaceItemData {
  valuePoints: number;  // strictly number
}
export interface MarketplaceContentData {
  shippingValuePoints?: number;  // strictly number
  valuePoints?: number;  // strictly number
}
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
export interface MarketplaceItemData {
  valuePoints: number | string;  // WIDENED
}
export interface MarketplaceContentData {
  shippingValuePoints?: number | string;  // WIDENED
  valuePoints?: number | string;  // WIDENED
}
```

**Impact:** Type widening allows strings where only numbers were expected. This could cause runtime issues if math operations are performed on these values.

**Recommendation:** If the API can return strings, add runtime parsing (e.g., `Number(valuePoints)`) where math is needed. If always numbers, revert to strict typing.

---

### 8. Type casting changed from `as any` to `as never`

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx`

**Original:**
```typescript
type={(marketplaceContent.statusColor as any) || 'neutral'}
iconRight={null as any}
icon={transaction.icon as any}
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
type={(marketplaceContent.statusColor as never) || 'neutral'}
iconRight={null as never}
icon={transaction.icon as never}
```

**Impact:** Cosmetic but `as never` is semantically incorrect here. `never` means a value that can never exist, not "bypass type checking".

**Recommendation:** Either fix the underlying type definitions or use `as unknown as ExpectedType` for explicit casting. `as any` is actually more correct than `as never` for this use case.

---

## Minor Issues

### 9. Theme import changed

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx`

**Original:**
```typescript
import theme from '../../styles/theme';
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';
```

**Impact:** Different theme source. Should be verified that both themes are equivalent.

**Recommendation:** Confirm the design system package exports the same theme structure. This is likely intentional to use the shared design system.

---

### 10. Parameter renamed in `getFormattedHighlightText`

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/utils.ts`

**Original:**
```typescript
export const getFormattedHighlightText = (date: string, gainType: TransactionGainType, moment: any): string => {
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
export const getFormattedHighlightText = (
  date: string,
  _gainType: TransactionGainType,  // RENAMED with underscore
  momentInstance: typeof moment,  // RENAMED
): string => {
```

**Impact:** The `gainType` was renamed to `_gainType` (indicating unused), and `moment` to `momentInstance`. The underscore prefix is unnecessary since it was already unused in original.

**Recommendation:** If `gainType` is unused, consider removing it from the function signature entirely to clean up the API.

---

### 11. Added `@ts-ignore` comment

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`

**Migrated added:**
```typescript
/* @ts-ignore `source` is not in the props Of `image` ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°) */
source={{ uri: emptyImage }}
```

**Impact:** Type error suppression that wasn't in original. Indicates potential type mismatch.

**Recommendation:** Fix the underlying type definition for the Image component or verify the prop name is correct.

---

### 12. Box styling changed in `ListEmptyComponent`

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`

**Original:**
```typescript
<Box height="100%" align="center" justify="center" mt="larger">
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
<Box align="center" pd="innerLarger" justify="center" mt="larger">
```

**Impact:** Removed `height="100%"` and added `pd="innerLarger"`. This changes the layout of the empty state component.

**Recommendation:** Test the empty state visually. The original used full height centering; the migrated uses padding. Behavior may differ depending on parent container.

---

## Files Verified as Correctly Migrated

| File | Status |
|------|--------|
| `src/services/api/orderDetail.api.ts` | Identical |
| `src/services/repository/orderDetail.repository.ts` | Identical (formatting only) |
| `src/services/store/orderDetail.store.ts` | Identical (formatting only) |
| `src/services/models/orderDetail.model.ts` | Minor addition of re-export (acceptable) |
| `src/services/utils/cleanup.ts` | Correctly updated with `orderDetailActions.reset()` |
| `src/services/constants.ts` | Correctly added ORDER_DETAIL events |
| Route registrations | Correctly added |

---

## Recommended Actions

### High Priority
1. **Issue #3:** Restore `handleOpenInfo` in destructuring or remove from interface
2. **Issue #5:** Confirm business requirement for `Math.abs()` on amounts
3. **Issue #6:** Add event types properly instead of using `as never`

### Medium Priority
4. **Issue #1:** Verify `useMemo` dependencies are complete
5. **Issue #4:** Verify `tintColor` format is correct for RefreshControl
6. **Issue #7:** Add runtime parsing if API can return string values

### Low Priority
7. **Issue #8:** Change `as never` back to `as any` or fix types properly
8. **Issue #10:** Remove unused `_gainType` parameter
9. **Issue #11:** Fix Image component type definition
10. **Issue #12:** Test empty state layout

---

## Conclusion

The migration is largely complete but contains 12 issues that warrant review before release. The most critical are:

- **Issue #3** (missing prop) - Could cause runtime errors if the prop is accessed
- **Issue #5** (Math.abs) - Changes visible data to users
- **Issue #7** (type widening) - Could cause runtime math errors

All other issues are either cosmetic improvements, acceptable structural changes, or minor type safety concerns that don't affect runtime behavior.

# Migration Analysis Report: Order Details Feature

**Date:** 2026-02-10
**Commit:** 74de00f292e2cad44c310fc17b2a7c7810bdef4b
**Feature:** MyOrdersDetails (Detalhes do Pedido)
**Source:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place` (branch: `feature/SPMAIS-32275_`)
**Target:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram`

---

## Summary

This report identifies all discrepancies between the original code in card-place and the migrated code in rewardprogram. **CRITICAL issues that could affect functionality are marked with severity levels.**

---

## CRITICAL ISSUES (Logic Changes / Bugs)

### 1. Missing `handleOpenInfo` Destructuring in View

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx`
**Severity:** HIGH
**Type:** Missing prop destructuring

**Original (card-place:16-19):**
```typescript
  handleOpenReportProblem,
  handleCloseReportProblem,
  handleOpenInfo,
  handleCloseInfo,
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram:27-29):**
```typescript
  handleCloseReportProblem,
  handleCloseInfo,
```

**Issue:** `handleOpenInfo` is passed from the controller but NOT destructured in the view component. The prop exists in `MyOrdersDetailProps` interface (line 46), but is never used. If any code tried to call `handleOpenInfo()`, it would be undefined.

**Note:** Upon further analysis, `handleOpenInfo` is NOT actually used in the view.tsx render - it was passed but never called in the original either. However, this inconsistency is still a deviation from the original.

---

### 2. Added `Math.abs()` to Amount Display - LOGIC CHANGE

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`
**Severity:** HIGH
**Type:** Logic alteration

**Original (card-place:93):**
```typescript
titleDescription={String(item.amount)}
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram:97):**
```typescript
titleDescription={String(Math.abs(item.amount))}
```

**Issue:** The migrated version wraps `item.amount` in `Math.abs()`, which changes how negative amounts are displayed. This is a FUNCTIONAL CHANGE that affects the UI behavior.

---

### 3. Added `useMemo` to `enrichedTransaction` - LOGIC CHANGE

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx`
**Severity:** MEDIUM
**Type:** Memoization behavior change

**Original (card-place:125-134):**
```typescript
const enrichedTransaction = transaction ? {
  ...transaction,
  type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
  icon: passedIcon || transaction.icon,
  status: passedStatus || transaction.status,
  details: {
    ...transaction.details,
    provider: passedOrigination || transaction.details?.provider || '',
  },
} : undefined;
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram:138-156):**
```typescript
const enrichedTransaction = useMemo(() => {
  if (!transaction) return undefined;
  return {
    ...transaction,
    type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
    icon: passedIcon || transaction.icon,
    status: passedStatus || transaction.status,
    details: {
      ...transaction.details,
      provider: passedOrigination || transaction.details?.provider || '',
    },
  };
}, [
  transaction,
  passedType,
  passedIcon,
  passedStatus,
  passedOrigination,
]);
```

**Issue:** The migrated version adds `useMemo` wrapping which changes re-render behavior. While this is typically an optimization, it introduces a deviation in component lifecycle behavior.

---

## MEDIUM ISSUES (Type Changes)

### 4. Type Widening in MarketplaceItemData/MarketplaceContentData

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts`
**Severity:** MEDIUM
**Type:** Type definition change

**Original (card-place):**
```typescript
export interface MarketplaceItemData {
  valuePoints: number;  // line 24
}

export interface MarketplaceContentData {
  shippingValuePoints?: number;  // line 34
  valuePoints?: number;  // line 35
}
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram):**
```typescript
export interface MarketplaceItemData {
  valuePoints: number | string;  // line 24
}

export interface MarketplaceContentData {
  shippingValuePoints?: number | string;  // line 34
  valuePoints?: number | string;  // line 35
}
```

**Issue:** Types were widened to include `string`. This could mask type errors and indicates the original strict typing was loosened.

---

### 5. Type Widening in FilterGroup Options

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts`
**Severity:** LOW
**Type:** Type definition change

**Original (card-place:30-35):**
```typescript
options: {
  label: string;
  value: number;
}[];
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram:24-26):**
```typescript
options: {
  label: string;
  value: number | string;
}[];
```

---

### 6. Missing `MyOrdersItem` Interface

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts`
**Severity:** LOW
**Type:** Missing export

**Original (card-place:14-23):**
```typescript
export interface MyOrdersItem {
    id: string
    date: string
    description: string
    type: string
    amount: string
    icon: string
    status: string
    origination: string
}
```

**Migrated:** This interface is MISSING entirely from the migrated models file.

---

## LOW ISSUES (Import/Style Changes)

### 7. Theme Import Source Changed

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx`
**Severity:** LOW
**Type:** Import path change

**Original (card-place:5):**
```typescript
import theme from '../../styles/theme';
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram:13):**
```typescript
import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';
```

**Also in `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`:**

**Original (card-place):** Uses `tintColor={"BRAND_BASE_01"}` (string)
**Migrated (rewardprogram:48):** Uses `tintColor={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01}` (theme object)

---

### 8. Parameter Naming Convention Change

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/utils.ts`
**Severity:** LOW
**Type:** Naming convention

**Original (card-place:34):**
```typescript
export const getFormattedHighlightText = (date: string, gainType: TransactionGainType, moment: any): string => {
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram:51-55):**
```typescript
export const getFormattedHighlightText = (
  date: string,
  _gainType: TransactionGainType,
  momentInstance: typeof moment,
): string => {
```

**Issue:** `gainType` renamed to `_gainType` (unused variable convention) and `moment` renamed to `momentInstance` with proper typing.

---

### 9. Component Signature Change

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx`
**Severity:** LOW
**Type:** Component signature

**Original (card-place:25):**
```typescript
const MyOrdersDetails: FC<ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>> = ({
  navigation,
  route,
}) => {
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram:30-31):**
```typescript
const MyOrdersDetails = ({ route }: ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>) => {
  const navigation = useNavigation();
```

**Issue:** Removed `FC` type wrapper and moved `navigation` to use `useNavigation()` hook.

---

### 10. Box Component Props Change in Empty State

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`
**Severity:** LOW
**Type:** UI styling change

**Original (card-place:107):**
```typescript
<Box height="100%" align="center" justify="center" mt="larger">
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram:119):**
```typescript
<Box align="center" pd="innerLarger" justify="center" mt="larger">
```

**Issue:** Removed `height="100%"` and added `pd="innerLarger"`. This may affect layout.

---

### 11. Added TypeScript Type Casting

**File:** `src/services/services/orderDetail.service.ts`
**Severity:** LOW
**Type:** TypeScript typing

**Original (card-place:23, 32):**
```typescript
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS');
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR');
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram:24, 33):**
```typescript
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS' as never);
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR' as never);
```

---

## ADDITIONS (New Code in Migrated Version)

### 12. Additional Properties in extract.model.ts

**File:** `src/services/models/extract.model.ts`

Added in migrated version:
- Line 75: `origination?: string;` to PointsTransaction
- Lines 117-119: `ExpiringFilters` interface
- Line 123: `appliedExpiringFilters?: ExpiringFilters;` to PointsExtractFiltersState

These are additions that don't exist in the original, but appear intentional for the new repository structure.

---

### 13. Re-export Added in orderDetail.model.ts

**File:** `src/services/models/orderDetail.model.ts`

**Migrated (line 3):**
```typescript
export type { PointsTransaction };
```

This re-export doesn't exist in the original.

---

## VERIFICATION CHECKLIST

| Issue | Severity | File | Line(s) | Action Required |
|-------|----------|------|---------|-----------------|
| Missing handleOpenInfo destructuring | HIGH | view.tsx (MyOrdersDetails) | 27-29 | ADD `handleOpenInfo,` to destructuring |
| Math.abs() added to amount | HIGH | view.tsx (MyOrdersRewardProgram) | 97 | REMOVE Math.abs() to match original |
| useMemo added to enrichedTransaction | MEDIUM | index.tsx (MyOrdersDetails) | 138-156 | REMOVE useMemo wrapper to match original |
| Type widening (number to number\|string) | MEDIUM | Models/index.ts (MyOrdersDetails) | 24, 34, 35 | REVERT to `number` only |
| Type widening in filterGroups | LOW | models/index.ts (MyOrdersRewardProgram) | 25 | REVERT to `number` only |
| Missing MyOrdersItem interface | LOW | models/index.ts (MyOrdersRewardProgram) | N/A | ADD interface if needed |
| Theme import path | LOW | view.tsx (both screens) | various | Acceptable change for new repo structure |
| Parameter naming (_gainType) | LOW | utils.ts (MyOrdersDetails) | 53 | Cosmetic, no functional impact |
| FC type removal | LOW | index.tsx (MyOrdersDetails) | 30 | Cosmetic, no functional impact |
| Box props change | LOW | view.tsx (MyOrdersRewardProgram) | 119 | REVIEW layout impact |
| Type casting (as never) | LOW | orderDetail.service.ts | 24, 33 | TypeScript workaround, no runtime impact |

---

## RECOMMENDED FIXES (Priority Order)

1. **CRITICAL:** Remove `Math.abs()` from MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:97
2. **CRITICAL:** Add `handleOpenInfo,` to destructuring in MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx
3. **MEDIUM:** Remove useMemo from enrichedTransaction or confirm optimization is intentional
4. **MEDIUM:** Revert type widening in MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts

---

## Files Analyzed

### Screens
- `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx`
- `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx`
- `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/utils.ts`

# Migration Analysis Report - Order Details Feature

## Summary

This report documents all differences between the original code in `rnm-app-fintech-card-place` (branch `feature/SPMAIS-32275_`) and the migrated code in `rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram` (commit `74de00f2`).

**Critical Issues:** 5
**Logic Changes (MUST FIX):** 3
**Type/Structural Changes:** 8
**Missing Elements:** 2

---

## CRITICAL - Logic Changes (MUST FIX)

These are changes that alter runtime behavior and must be reverted to match the original:

### 1. `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:97` - Math.abs Added to Amount Display

**Original:**
```typescript
titleDescription={String(item.amount)}
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
titleDescription={String(Math.abs(item.amount))}
```

**Impact:** Changes displayed value. Original shows `-10`, migrated shows `10`. **This is a logic change.**

---

### 2. `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:119` - Box Props Changed in ListEmptyComponent

**Original:**
```typescript
<Box height="100%" align="center" justify="center" mt="larger">
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
<Box align="center" pd="innerLarger" justify="center" mt="larger">
```

**Impact:** Layout change - `height="100%"` was replaced with `pd="innerLarger"`. This changes the empty state layout.

---

### 3. `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx:138-156` - enrichedTransaction Wrapped in useMemo

**Original:**
```typescript
const enrichedTransaction = transaction ? {
  ...transaction,
  type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
  // ...
} : undefined;
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
const enrichedTransaction = useMemo(() => {
  if (!transaction) return undefined;
  return {
    ...transaction,
    type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
    // ...
  };
}, [transaction, passedType, passedIcon, passedStatus, passedOrigination]);
```

**Impact:** While functionally similar, this adds memoization that wasn't in the original. Could affect re-render behavior.

---

## HIGH - Missing Props/Elements

### 4. `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx:29` - Missing handleOpenInfo in Destructuring

**Original destructuring includes:**
```typescript
handleOpenInfo,
handleCloseInfo,
```

**Migrated destructuring (line 29):**
```typescript
handleCloseInfo,
// handleOpenInfo is MISSING
```

**Impact:** `handleOpenInfo` is passed as a prop but not destructured in the migrated version. While currently unused in the component body, this is an inconsistency.

---

### 5. `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts` - Missing MyOrdersItem Interface

**Original has:**
```typescript
export interface MyOrdersItem {
    id: string
    date: string
    description: string
    type: string
    amount: string
    icon: string
    status: string
    origination: string
}
```

**Migrated:** This interface is completely removed.

**Impact:** May cause type errors if anything depends on this interface.

---

## MEDIUM - Type Changes

### 6. `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts:24,34-35` - Type Widened to Include String

**Original:**
```typescript
valuePoints: number;
// and
shippingValuePoints?: number;
valuePoints?: number;
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
valuePoints: number | string;
// and
shippingValuePoints?: number | string;
valuePoints?: number | string;
```

**Impact:** Type was widened. Original only accepts number, migrated accepts both number and string. This is a type safety reduction.

---

### 7. `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts:24` - Type Changed for Filter Options

**Original:**
```typescript
value: number;
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
value: number | string;
```

**Impact:** Type widening in filter options.

---

### 8. `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts:34` - Parameter Name Changed

**Original:**
```typescript
handleDetailsOrders: (orderId: string, type?: string, icon?: string, status?: string, origination?: string) => void;
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
handleDetailsOrders: (transactionId: string, type?: string, icon?: string, status?: string, origination?: string) => void;
```

**Impact:** Parameter name changed from `orderId` to `transactionId`. Functionally identical but inconsistent with original.

---

## LOW - Type Casting Changes

### 9. `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx` - Type Casts Changed from `any` to `never`

**Original:**
```typescript
(marketplaceContent.statusColor as any)
iconRight={null as any}
icon={transaction.icon as any}
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
(marketplaceContent.statusColor as never)
iconRight={null as never}
icon={transaction.icon as never}
```

**Impact:** Using `never` instead of `any` is stricter but may cause type errors in edge cases.

---

### 10. `src/services/services/orderDetail.service.ts:24,33` - Type Cast Added

**Original:**
```typescript
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS');
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR');
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS' as never);
eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR' as never);
```

**Impact:** Added `as never` cast that wasn't in original.

---

## LOW - Component Signature Changes

### 11. `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx:30-31` - Component Signature Simplified

**Original:**
```typescript

  navigation,
```

**Migrated:**

## LOW - Parameter Renaming

### 12. `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/utils.ts:53-54` - Parameter Names Changed

**Original:**
```typescript
export const getFormattedHighlightText = (date: string, gainType: TransactionGainType, moment: any): string => {
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
export const getFormattedHighlightText = (
  date: string,
  _gainType: TransactionGainType,
  momentInstance: typeof moment,
): string => {
```

**Impact:** `gainType` renamed to `_gainType` (unused), `moment` renamed to `momentInstance`. Functionally equivalent.

---

## LOW - Import Changes (Expected)

### 13. `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:48` - tintColor Implementation Changed

**Original:**
```typescript
tintColor={"BRAND_BASE_01"}
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
tintColor={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01}
```

**Impact:** The original uses a string directly, migrated uses theme object. Need to verify if original was intentional or a bug.

---

### 14. `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx:13` - Theme Import Changed

**Original:**
```typescript
import theme from '../../styles/theme';
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';
```

**Impact:** Different theme source. May have different values.

---

## INFO - Additions Not in Original (May Need Removal)

### 15. `src/services/models/extract.model.ts:75` - New Field Added

**Migrated adds:**
```typescript
origination?: string;  // Added to PointsTransaction interface
```

**Note:** This wasn't in the original Order Details feature. Verify if this was added by another feature migration or is a hallucination.

### 16. `src/services/models/extract.model.ts:117-119` - New Interface Added

**Migrated adds:**

```typescript
  period?: number;

```

**Migrated adds:**



**Migrated:**


**Impact:** Adds re-export that wasn't in original.

---

### 19. `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:122-123` - Added ts-ignore Comment

**Migrated adds:**
```typescript
/* @ts-ignore `source` is not in the props Of `image` ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°) */
```

# Migration Analysis Report: OrderDetails Feature

**Commit analyzed:** `74de00f292e2cad44c310fc17b2a7c7810bdef4b`
**Source repository:** `rnm-app-fintech-card-place` (branch: `feature/SPMAIS-32275_`)
**Target repository:** `rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram`
**Date:** 2026-02-10

---

## Summary

This report documents all differences between the original OrderDetails code in `card-place` and the migrated version in `rewardprogram`. Several logic changes, hallucinations, and omissions were found that deviate from the original implementation.

---

## CRITICAL ISSUES (Logic Changes)

### 1. `MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx` - Math.abs() Added to Amount Display

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:97`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `titleDescription={String(item.amount)}` | `titleDescription={String(Math.abs(item.amount))}` |

**Impact:** Changes how amounts are displayed. Negative amounts (like rescues) will now appear as positive values. This is a **logic change** that affects the UI.

---

### 2. `MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx` - tintColor Implementation Changed

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:48`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `tintColor={"BRAND_BASE_01"}` | `tintColor={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01}` |

**Impact:** Original passes a string token directly to the component (which might be handled internally). Migrated version passes the resolved color hex value. Depending on how the component handles this prop, the behavior could differ.

**Additional:** New import added: `import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';`

---

### 3. `MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx` - ListEmptyComponent Layout Changed

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:119`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `<Box height="100%" align="center" justify="center" mt="larger">` | `<Box align="center" pd="innerLarger" justify="center" mt="larger">` |

**Impact:**
- Removed `height="100%"` - affects vertical centering
- Added `pd="innerLarger"` - adds padding that wasn't in original

---

### 4. `MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx` - enrichedTransaction Wrapped in useMemo

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx:138-156`

**Original:**
```typescript
const enrichedTransaction = transaction ? {
  ...transaction,
  type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
  icon: passedIcon || transaction.icon,
  status: passedStatus || transaction.status,
  details: {
    ...transaction.details,
    provider: passedOrigination || transaction.details?.provider || '',
  },
} : undefined;
```

**Migrated:**
```typescript
const enrichedTransaction = useMemo(() => {
  if (!transaction) return undefined;
  return {
    ...transaction,
    type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
    icon: passedIcon || transaction.icon,
    status: passedStatus || transaction.status,
    details: {
      ...transaction.details,
      provider: passedOrigination || transaction.details?.provider || '',
    },
  };
}, [transaction, passedType, passedIcon, passedStatus, passedOrigination]);
```

**Impact:** The `useMemo` wrapper was added. This changes when the object is recalculated. The original recalculated on every render, while the migrated version only recalculates when dependencies change. This is an **optimization** but could cause subtle bugs if the original behavior was intentional.

---

### 5. `MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx` - Component Signature Changed

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx:30-31`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `const MyOrdersDetails: FC<ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>> = ({ navigation, route }) => {` | `const MyOrdersDetails = ({ route }: ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>) => {` |

**Impact:**
- Removed `FC` type annotation
- `navigation` prop removed, replaced with `useNavigation()` hook call (line 31)

While functionally equivalent in most cases, this changes how the component receives navigation.

---

### 6. `MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx` - handleOpenInfo Missing from Props

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx:29`

**Original (line 17):**
```typescript
  handleOpenInfo,
  handleCloseInfo,
```

**Migrated (line 29):**
```typescript
  handleCloseInfo,
```

**Impact:** `handleOpenInfo` was removed from the destructured props. The prop is still defined in the interface but not destructured in the component.

---

### 7. `MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx` - Theme Import Path Changed

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx:13`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `import theme from '../../styles/theme';` | `import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';` |

**Impact:** Uses the design system's theme directly instead of a local theme file. Could cause color/spacing discrepancies if the themes differ.

---

## TYPE CHANGES (Potential Type Errors Masked)

### 8. `MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts` - Type Widening

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts:24,34,35`

| Field | Original | Migrated |
|-------|----------|----------|
| `MarketplaceItemData.valuePoints` | `number` | `number \| string` |
| `MarketplaceContentData.shippingValuePoints` | `number` | `number \| string` |
| `MarketplaceContentData.valuePoints` | `number` | `number \| string` |

**Impact:** These type changes widen the types to accept strings, which could mask type errors and potentially cause runtime issues if string handling is not implemented.

---

### 9. `MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts` - Type Widening

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts:24`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `value: number;` | `value: number \| string;` |

---

### 10. `MyOrdersDetails/utils.ts` - Parameter Renaming

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/utils.ts:53-54`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `gainType: TransactionGainType` | `_gainType: TransactionGainType` |
| `moment: any` | `momentInstance: typeof moment` |

**Impact:** The underscore prefix on `_gainType` indicates the parameter is unused, which is correct. The `moment` parameter was renamed to `momentInstance` with proper typing.

---

## CODE QUALITY ISSUES

### 11. `orderDetail.service.ts` - Type Assertions with `as never`

**File:** `src/services/services/orderDetail.service.ts:24,33`

| Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|
| `eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS')` | `eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_SUCCESS' as never)` |
| `eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR')` | `eventServerResponse('ORDER_DETAIL_ERROR' as never)` |

**Impact:** The `as never` casts are a code smell indicating a type mismatch. The original passed strings directly. This should be investigated.

---

### 12. `MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx` - @ts-ignore Comment Added

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:122-123`

```typescript
/* @ts-ignore `source` is not in the props Of `image` ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°) */
source={{ uri: emptyImage }}
```

**Impact:** A `@ts-ignore` comment was added that wasn't in the original. This suppresses TypeScript errors instead of fixing the underlying type issue.

---

### 13. `MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx` - Type Casts Changed

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx` (multiple locations)

| Location | Original | Migrated |
|----------|----------|----------|
| Line 118 | `(marketplaceContent.statusColor as any)` | `(marketplaceContent.statusColor as never)` |
| Line 200 | `iconRight={null as any}` | `iconRight={null as never}` |
| Line 234 | `icon={transaction.icon as any}` | `icon={transaction.icon as never}` |

---

## REMOVED CODE

### 14. `MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts` - Interface Removed

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts`

The `MyOrdersItem` interface was completely removed from the migrated version:

```typescript
// REMOVED:
export interface MyOrdersItem {
    id: string
    date: string
    description: string
    type: string
    amount: string
    icon: string
    status: string
    origination: string
}
```

---

## ADDED CODE

### 15. `orderDetail.model.ts` - Extra Re-export Added

**File:** `src/services/models/orderDetail.model.ts:3`

```typescript
export type { PointsTransaction };  // This line was added
```

Not in original - added as a convenience re-export.

---

### 16. `MyOrdersRewardProgram/index.tsx` - FilterGroup Import Added

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/index.tsx:16,66`

```typescript
import { FilterGroup } from '../ExtractRewardProgram/Models';
// ...
const filterGroups: FilterGroup[] = [...]
```

Original didn't have explicit type annotation, migrated adds explicit typing.

---

## FILES VERIFIED AS CORRECTLY MIGRATED

- `src/services/api/orderDetail.api.ts` - Identical logic
- `src/services/repository/orderDetail.repository.ts` - Identical logic (formatting only)
- `src/services/store/orderDetail.store.ts` - Identical logic (formatting only)
- `src/routes/index.tsx` - MyOrdersDetails route properly added
- `src/routes/Models/index.ts` - MyOrdersDetails params correctly defined
- `src/services/store/slices.ts` - OrderDetailSlice properly integrated
- `src/services/constants.ts` - ORDER_DETAIL analytics events added
- `src/services/utils/cleanup.ts` - orderDetailActions.reset() added

---

## RECOMMENDATIONS

### High Priority (Logic Changes to Revert):
1. **Remove `Math.abs()` from amount display** - Revert to `String(item.amount)`
2. **Revert tintColor change** - Use `"BRAND_BASE_01"` string instead of `theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01`
3. **Restore ListEmptyComponent layout** - Add back `height="100%"`, remove `pd="innerLarger"`
4. **Consider reverting useMemo on enrichedTransaction** - Original didn't use memoization

### Medium Priority (Type Safety):
5. **Revert type widening** - Keep `valuePoints` as `number` only
6. **Fix `as never` casts** - Investigate and fix the underlying type issues
7. **Remove @ts-ignore** - Fix the Image component typing properly

### Low Priority (Code Quality):
8. **Restore handleOpenInfo in props destructuring** - Even if unused
9. **Restore MyOrdersItem interface** - May be needed elsewhere

---

## VERIFICATION CHECKLIST

Before deploying, verify:
- [ ] Amount displays correctly for both positive and negative values
- [ ] RefreshControl tint color appears correctly
- [ ] Empty state layout matches original design
- [ ] Order details load and display correctly
- [ ] Status colors map correctly
- [ ] Marketplace items render with images
- [ ] Navigation to/from order details works
- [ ] Analytics events fire correctly

# Migration Analysis Report: OrderDetails Feature

## Overview

**Source Repository:** `rnm-app-fintech-card-place` (branch: `feature/SPMAIS-32275_`)
**Target Repository:** `rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram` (commit: `74de00f2`)
**Migration Date:** February 2026
**Analyzed By:** Code Review Analysis

---

## Summary of Findings

| Category | Count |
|----------|-------|
| Critical Issues (Logic/Behavior Changes) | 2 |
| Type Changes (Potential Breaking) | 3 |
| Missing Interfaces/Exports | 1 |
| Unnecessary Additions | 4 |
| Code Style Changes | 3 |

---

## Critical Issues (Logic/Behavior Changes)

### 1. Math.abs() Added to Amount Display

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`
**Line:** 97

**Original (card-place):**
```tsx
titleDescription={String(item.amount)}
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram):**
```tsx
titleDescription={String(Math.abs(item.amount))}
```

**Impact:** MEDIUM-HIGH
**Explanation:** This changes the displayed value by always showing positive amounts. If negative amounts were intentionally displayed (e.g., debits showing as negative), this change alters the user-facing behavior. The original code preserved the sign, which may have been intentional for visual distinction between credits and debits.

---

### 2. Layout Property Change in Empty State

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`
**Line:** 119

**Original (card-place):**
```tsx
<Box align="center" height="100%" justify="center" mt="larger">
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram):**
```tsx
<Box align="center" pd="innerLarger" justify="center" mt="larger">
```

**Impact:** MEDIUM
**Explanation:** Changed from `height="100%"` to `pd="innerLarger"`. This fundamentally changes the layout behavior:
- `height="100%"` makes the box fill the entire container height
- `pd="innerLarger"` adds padding but does not control height

This could cause the empty state to appear differently positioned, especially on different screen sizes.

---

## Type Changes (Potential Breaking)

### 3. Type Widening: valuePoints in MarketplaceItemData

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts`
**Line:** 24

**Original (card-place):**
```tsx
export interface MarketplaceItemData {
  valuePoints: number;
  // ...
}
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram):**
```tsx
export interface MarketplaceItemData {
  valuePoints: number | string;
  // ...
}
```

**Impact:** LOW-MEDIUM
**Explanation:** Type widening from `number` to `number | string`. While this is backwards compatible for consumers, it may indicate:
1. An unhandled edge case in the original
2. Data inconsistency from the API
3. A decision to accept pre-formatted strings

This requires runtime handling changes if the code expects numeric operations on `valuePoints`.

---

### 4. Type Widening: shippingValuePoints in MarketplaceContentData

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts`
**Line:** 34

```tsx
shippingValuePoints?: number;
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram):**

```tsx
shippingValuePoints?: number | string;
```

**Impact:** LOW-MEDIUM
**Explanation:** Same type widening pattern as above. Consistency with `valuePoints` change.

## Missing Interfaces/Exports

### 6. Missing MyOrdersItem Interface

**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts`

**Original (card-place):**
```tsx
export interface MyOrdersItem {
  id: string;
  date: string;
  description: string;

  origination?: string;
}

export interface MyOrdersItemPropsView {

  // ...
```

**Migrated (rewardprogram):**
```tsx
// MyOrdersItem interface is MISSING
// Uses PointsTransaction directly instead

  myOrders: PointsTransaction[];
  // ...
```

**Impact:** LOW
**Explanation:** The `MyOrdersItem` interface was removed and replaced with direct use of `PointsTransaction`. While this reduces code duplication, it changes the contract of the view component. The `PointsTransaction` type includes additional fields (`details`, `marketplace`) that weren't in `MyOrdersItem`, which may cause:
1. Over-fetching of data
2. Prop type mismatches
3. Different data shape expectations

# Plan: Fix Migration Issues in Order Details Feature

## Summary

Based on comprehensive analysis of the original code in `rnm-app-fintech-card-place` (branch `feature/SPMAIS-32275_`) and the migrated code in commit `74de00f2`, I've identified **12 issues** that need correction. The Claude Code migration introduced several logic changes, type widening, and missing elements that deviate from the original tested implementation.

---

## Critical Fixes (Logic Changes - MUST REVERT)

### 1. Remove `Math.abs()` from Amount Display
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:97`

```diff
- titleDescription={String(Math.abs(item.amount))}
+ titleDescription={String(item.amount)}
```
**Reason:** This changes user-visible data. Negative amounts (like rescues) should display with their sign.

---

### 2. Revert Box Props in ListEmptyComponent
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx:119`

```diff
- <Box align="center" pd="innerLarger" justify="center" mt="larger">
+ <Box height="100%" align="center" justify="center" mt="larger">
```
**Reason:** Original uses `height="100%"` for proper centering. Migrated version uses padding instead.

---

### 3. Remove `useMemo` Wrapper from `enrichedTransaction`
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx:138-156`

```diff
- const enrichedTransaction = useMemo(() => {
-   if (!transaction) return undefined;
-   return {
-     ...transaction,
-     type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
-     icon: passedIcon || transaction.icon,
-     status: passedStatus || transaction.status,
-     details: {
-       ...transaction.details,
-       provider: passedOrigination || transaction.details?.provider || '',
-     },
-   };
- }, [
-   transaction,
-   passedType,
-   passedIcon,
-   passedStatus,
-   passedOrigination,
- ]);
+ const enrichedTransaction = transaction ? {
+   ...transaction,
+   type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
+   icon: passedIcon || transaction.icon,
+   status: passedStatus || transaction.status,
+   details: {
+     ...transaction.details,
+     provider: passedOrigination || transaction.details?.provider || '',
+   },
+ } : undefined;
```
**Reason:** Original doesn't use memoization. Adding it changes reference behavior.

---

### 4. Add Missing `handleOpenInfo` to Props Destructuring
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx:29`

```diff
  handleOpenReportProblem,
  handleCloseReportProblem,
+ handleOpenInfo,
  handleCloseInfo,
```
**Reason:** Prop exists in interface but was removed from destructuring.

---

## High Priority Fixes (Type Changes)

### 5. Revert Type Widening in MarketplaceItemData
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts:24`

```diff
export interface MarketplaceItemData {
  name: string;
  quantity: number;
- valuePoints: number | string;
+ valuePoints: number;
  imageUrl?: string;
  cleanedImageUrl?: string;
}
```

```diff
export interface MarketplaceContentData {
  orderNumber: string;

  statusColor?: string;
  paymentType?: string;
- shippingValuePoints?: number | string;
- valuePoints?: number | string;
+ shippingValuePoints?: number;
+ valuePoints?: number;
  vendorName?: string;
  items: MarketplaceItemData[];
}
```

---

### 7. Revert Type Widening in Filter Options

```diff
filterGroups: {
  label: string;

    label: string;
-   value: number | string;
+   value: number;
  }[];

```

### 8. Add Back Missing `MyOrdersItem` Interface
**File:** `src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts`
